title: Hyperion Resume - Swapnil D
summary: Performance-driven and hard working Senior Salesforce Developer with a proven track record of success in developing new sustainable and robust business solutions for more than 5 years, holding passion towards learning new technical and functional skills, in self-pursuit of excellence.

description: Leading the team for Account-Address restructure for the entire org, design and development of Account search wizard, built multiple LWC components and implemented revamp of older integrations under the same
Built and managed components over the experience cloud and partner related functionalities - generally revolving around Account, Deals and Opportunity Management
Ownership of E2E solution of Price Estimation (PDF generation of Pre-Quote) with design and development of robust framework to maintain partner specific conditional discounts

Quick design and delivery of LWC forms to capture executive plan of action involving high level strategies and heat-maps by building framework with little to none code change required as part of fulfilling newer business requirements
Implemented heavy lifting functionalities like batch of batches, mass email generation, mass record updates through platform events etc
Perform code reviews, ensure good development standards are maintained, involved in maintenance of complete platform health etc
Constantly involved in fixing production bugs with quick turnaround time
Involved in AI incorporated MCP POCs and Gemini integration with Salesforce
Provided customised and sustainable solutions to major US clients like Pfizer and Humana by recognising their business requirements in the broader context of their digital strategy
Designed and implemented robust LWC components with necessary apex functionality to capture Patient Pre-enrolment and Enrolment data
Constructed Batch Apex and Schedulers to capture reporting relevant data metrics

Streamlined the content management system of Einstein bot by designing and developing top of class dynamic framework for message management with LWC and Apex which ultimately raised the self-serviceability of the bots to a new level
Ownership of entire chatbot design and development catering to Pfizers business needs
Managed client demos and knowledge transfer sessions
Was given the Applause award for my role in development of Pfizer related solutions
Ownership of functionality to send claims related data to necessary stakeholders in 837P format - was awarded Kudos
